emails.subject: Barangay 424 Resident Account Approved

Account Registration Approved!

Hello Delbert Stoltenberg,

Good news! Your account registration has been approved by the barangay staff.

You can now log in to the system and start making certificate or clearance requests online.

Log In Now

emails.subject: Certificate Request Claimed: Barangay Certificate - BRGY-TEST-123
emails.body:
Certificate Request Claimed

Hello Delbert Stoltenberg,

Your certificate request for Barangay Certificate (ID: BRGY-TEST-123) has been marked as Claimed.

Updated Request Timeline

SUBMITTED Jun 13, 2026, 8:56 PM
APPROVED Jun 13, 2026, 8:56 PM
CLAIMED Jun 13, 2026, 8:56 PM
Instructions to Claim:

Please bring a Barangay ID or any valid ID with your present address within the Barangay and present it to the staff in the Barangay Hall to receive the document.

If you have already received your document, thank you! You can log in below to check your request history.
